objectives.text: Report your Chapel and Ash Road conduct to Father Odran.
Pay or pray through Father Odran's road absolution.

stages.description: Father Odran says Chapel work and Ash Road work both leave marks. The Censure writes those marks down before sending anyone toward Hallowfen.
Father Odran has read the road record back to you. Absolution costs five ducats, or the missing coin made up in prayers.
You paid Father Odran's road price. Your soul now has a stamped receipt.
You made up the missing ducats with prayers. Father Odran counted each one like a man auditing rain.
You lied about your purse. Father Odran noticed, charged the extra ducat, and stamped the chit anyway.
